_publications._publicationTitle: Comparison of 1D and 3D volume measurement techniques in NF2-associated vestibular schwannoma monitoring.

_contextSnippet: Tukey post-hoc tests showed that for SVA, MLD³, and OA, all comparisons of Hannover categories with each other showed statistically significant differences (p < 0.001)
details: All comparisons of Hannover categories with each other showed statistically significant differences (p < 0.001) for SVA, MLD³, and OA measurements
